visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses and a grey patterned flat cap is featured in a medium shot, wearing a dark sweatshirt. He is speaking to the camera with active hand gestures in a brightly lit indoor room with a soft-focus background. Social media handles for Facebook and Instagram are displayed as logos in the upper left corner. (2) Various graphic elements appear around the man, including an illustration of Donald Trump and a map of New Hampshire. Text captions in colorful boxes appear at the bottom center of the frame, changing rapidly to match his speech. The man continues to use expressive hand movements, including pointing and clasping his hands. (3) Icons of gold bars, silver stacks, and the Bitcoin symbol are overlaid on the screen. A financial chart with a red upward-sloping line and stacks of gold coins is shown to visualize market trends. The man maintains a friendly and engaging facial expression while looking directly at the camera. (4) The video concludes with the man leaning slightly forward, his hands held up as if asking a question. Large bold text appears over his torso, followed by a final question directed at the audience. The lighting remains bright and professional studio-quality throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 不止喔. (2) [Subtitle]: 川普狂囤比特幣. (3) [Subtitle]: 美國州政府也跟進了. [Subtitle]: 新罕布夏州正式立法. (4) [Subtitle]: 將比特幣納入了戰略財政儲備. (5) [Subtitle]: 依據《HB302法案》. (6) [Subtitle]: 州政府可以將最多5%的公共資金. [Subtitle]: 投資於黃金、白銀. (7) [Subtitle]: 還有市值超過5000億美元的數位資產. [Subtitle]: 5000億美元. (8) [Subtitle]: 目前唯一符合數位資產就是什麼？比特幣. (9) [Subtitle]: 消息一出整個市場看漲. [Subtitle]: 剛看手機啊現在已經97000了. [Subtitle]: 97000. (10) [Subtitle]: 希望呢它可以挑戰100K美元的大關. [Subtitle]: 100K. (11) [Subtitle]: 同時也呼應了川普在3月啟動的戰略比特幣儲備. [Variety]: 比特幣儲備. (12) [Subtitle]: 那怎麼說呢？動用政府去查扣. (13) [Subtitle]: 20萬的比特幣作為國家資產. [Subtitle]: 20萬的比特幣. (14) [Subtitle]: 還強調說永久持有、不賣一枚. [Subtitle]: 永久持有、不賣一枚. (15) [Subtitle]: 現在美國聯邦還有地方州政府同步進場. (16) [Subtitle]: 難道比特幣真的要從虛擬貨幣變成國家級黃金了嗎？. [Variety]: ？？？. [Slogan]: 國家級黃金. (17) [Subtitle]: 你們覺得呢？.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male narrator speaks with a clear, energetic tone in Mandarin. The pitch is moderate, and the delivery is rapid and professional. The recording environment is extremely quiet, consistent with a professional studio or high-quality home setup. No ambient noise or room tone is detectable. (2) A sharp, short digital "pop" sound effect occurs, coinciding with a shift in the narrator's sentence structure. An upbeat electronic background music track is present, characterized by a steady rhythmic beat and clean synthesizer textures. The music is mixed well below the voice. (3) Frequent, rhythmic "click" and "pop" sound effects are heard, creating a sense of information being presented in sequence. The narrator's voice maintains high arousal and a positive valence. The music's tempo is approximately 120 BPM, providing a consistent energy layer. (4) The track continues with the narrator posing a question, noted by a rising intonation pattern. The music and speech end abruptly with a final digital UI sound effect. The overall mix exhibits high dynamic range and clear spectral separation between the vocal and instrumental tracks.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Explaining New Hampshire Legislation -> Trump's Strategic Influence -> Market Analysis -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about recent news involving New Hampshire's legislation to include Bitcoin in its strategic reserves and to discuss Donald Trump's potential impact on US Bitcoin policy.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual graphics and synchronized sound effects to make financial news more engaging for a social media audience.
